questionHtml:
The potential energy profile of a reaction is shown.

What can be determined about stability and energy change from the potential energy profile shown?

meta.title: The potential energy profile of a reaction is shown. What can be determined about stability and energy change from the potential energy profile shown?
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.1.3—The relative stability of reactants and products determines whether reactions are endothermic or exothermic. Sketch and interpret energy profiles for endothermic and exothermic reactions.
